subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Production image rollout denied. Violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires 48-hour staging validation before production deployment; (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup not mentioned in proposal; (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring configuration as prerequisites.
applied_constraints: Staging validation required: minimum 48 hours in pre-production environment
Change board approval mandatory before production rollout
Post-deployment monitoring and alerting must be configured
Automated rollback mechanism must be deployed and tested
